operational_knowledge_units.title: Map Monitor message panel exposes robot and AGV status indicators and fault actions
operational_knowledge_units.summary: The Map Monitor Message Panel includes access to active robot count, robots charging count, AGV fault display, disconnected AGV count, fault inspection details, faulted AGV location, and a system E-stop control.
observed_evidence: Bullet: 'Drop down to show AGV faults'
Bullet: 'Inspection to view details of fault'
operational_knowledge_units.retrieval_text: Map Monitor Message Panel UI concept. The panel can be opened and shows counts of active robots, robots charging, and AGVs disconnected. It includes a dropdown to show AGV faults, inspection to view fault details, an option to locate a faulted AGV, and an E-stop system control.

operational_knowledge_units.title: Message panel supports AGV fault monitoring and inspection
operational_knowledge_units.summary: The message panel is used to surface AGV faults, show disconnected AGV counts, inspect fault details, and locate a faulted AGV.
observed_evidence: Bullet: 'Drop down to show AGV faults'
Bullet: 'Inspection to view details of fault'
operational_knowledge_units.retrieval_text: Diagnostic concept for AGV faults in the Map Monitor Message Panel. Operators can use the panel dropdown to show AGV faults, review disconnected AGV counts, inspect fault details, and locate the faulted AGV.

procedure_candidate_attempts.title: Open the message panel and review AGV fault information
preconditions: User is viewing the Map Monitor screen.
Message Panel is available in the UI.
procedure_candidate_attempts.procedure_visual_summary: Slide-level reference for the Map Monitor Message Panel listing available monitoring and fault-related actions.

steps.action: Use the dropdown to show AGV faults.
steps.observed_evidence: Bullet: 'Drop down to show AGV faults'
steps.visual_region_hint: Message Panel dropdown or fault list area

steps.action: Inspect the fault to view details.
steps.observed_evidence: Bullet: 'Inspection to view details of fault'
steps.visual_region_hint: Fault inspection/details area in Message Panel
Locate faulted AGV control within Message Panel

warnings: The slide also references 'E stop the system' but does not provide enough instruction to include it as a reusable step sequence.
Counts of active robots, charging robots, and disconnected AGVs are listed as available panel information, not explicit action steps.
procedure_candidate_attempts.retrieval_text: Diagnostic check candidate for Map Monitor Message Panel. Open the message panel, use the dropdown to show AGV faults, inspect fault details, and locate the faulted AGV. Slide also indicates the panel shows robot and disconnection counts.
